reasoning: We are focusing on improving lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed a moderate effort, and now let's take it up a notch to better prepare for the Alpine Loop. Over-unders will target your primary limiter, aligning with the demands you'll face during the main climb segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x [6 min @ 242W-256W (over), 3 min @ 201W-218W (under)]. Focus on controlled breathing and maintaining form.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
